questions.question: What is the primary function of a Half Adder in a Binary Adder/Subtractor?
options: C) To perform bitwise XOR operation
D) To perform bitwise AND operation
questions.explanation: A Half Adder is primarily used to perform binary addition, and it is used as a building block to implement Full Adders.

questions.question: Which of the following Verilog code snippets is used to implement a Full Adder?
questions.explanation: A Full Adder can be implemented using the Verilog code `assign S = A&C^B;` which combines the Half Adder and the carry logic.

questions.question: What is the primary function of a Full Adder in a Binary Adder/Subtractor?
options: C) To perform bitwise XOR operation
D) To perform bitwise AND operation
questions.explanation: A Full Adder is primarily used to perform binary addition, and it is used as a building block to implement Half Adders.

questions.question: Which of the following Verilog code snippets is used to implement a Half Subtractor?
questions.explanation: A Half Subtractor can be implemented using the Verilog code `assign B = A^C;` which combines the Half Adder and the borrow logic.

questions.question: What is the primary function of a Binary Adder/Subtractor in digital design?
questions.explanation: A Binary Adder/Subtractor is primarily used to perform arithmetic operations, such as binary addition and subtraction, in digital design.
